chat.welcome: How can I help you today?
chat.welcomeDesc: Ask me about weather, settings, or any other tasks. I'm here to assist you.
chat.placeholder:
Start a new message...
Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for a new line
chat.notConnected: Gateway is not running. Start it to chat.
chat.historyOpenFailed: Failed to open this chat history

empty.noConfiguredModelDescription: You need to configure at least one AI model with an API key before you can start chatting.
empty.noSelectedModelDescription: You have configured models, but none is set as default. Select a model before starting chat.
empty.notRunningDescription: Start the gateway service to begin chatting. Use the Start Gateway button in the top bar.

chat.channelSwitchHint: This channel is configured via its settings page.

stopDialog.title: Stop Gateway Service?
stopDialog.description: Are you sure you want to stop the gateway? This will disconnect your active chat sessions and halt inference.

gateway.restartRequired: Model changes require a gateway restart to take effect.

credentials.description: Manage OAuth and token-based credentials for supported providers.

openai.description: Supports browser OAuth, device code, and token login.

anthropic.description: Uses token login for Claude access.

antigravity.description: Uses browser OAuth for Google Cloud Code Assist.

qwen.description: Uses device code login for Qwen Portal access.

minimax.description: Uses device code login for MiniMax Platform access.

logoutDialog.title: Logout provider?
logoutDialog.description: This will remove your saved credential for {{provider}}.

errors.popupBlocked: Unable to open a new tab. Please allow popups and try again.

device.title: Device Login
device.description: Open the verification page and enter the code below. This page will refresh automatically.

local.connectedDesc: Local server detected — no API key required. Models auto-discovered.
local.notRunningDesc: Local server not detected. Start the server and refresh to auto-discover models.

models.description: Configure API keys for AI providers. Only configured models are available for chat.
models.noDefaultHintPrefix: No default model set yet. Click

defaultOnSave.label: Default Model
defaultOnSave.description: Automatically set this model as default after saving.

add.title: Add Custom Model
add.description: Add an OpenAI-compatible or native model endpoint.
add.modelNameHint: A short name used to identify this model in conversations.
add.modelIdHint: Format: protocol/model-id. Supported: openai, anthropic, gemini, groq, …
add.errorDuplicateModelName: Model alias already exists. Please use a different name.

delete.title: Delete Model?
delete.description: "{{name}}" will be permanently removed from your model list. This cannot be undone.

field.apiKeyPlaceholderSet: Leave blank to keep existing key
field.authMethodHint: Authentication method: oauth, token. Leave blank for API key auth.
field.connectModeHint: Connection mode for CLI-based providers: stdio or grpc.
field.workspaceHint: Working directory for CLI-based providers (e.g. GitHub Copilot).
field.requestTimeoutHint: Maximum seconds to wait for a response. 0 = use default.
field.rpmHint: Maximum requests per minute. 0 = no limit.
field.thinkingLevelHint: Extended thinking budget: off, low, medium, high, xhigh, adaptive.
field.maxTokensFieldHint: Override the request field name for max tokens, e.g. max_completion_tokens.
field.extraBodyHint: Additional JSON fields to inject into the request body, e.g. {"reasoning_split": true}.

edit.title: Configure {{name}}
edit.apiKeyHint: A key is already set. Leave blank to keep it unchanged.
edit.oauthNote: This provider uses OAuth — no API key required.

aiUrl.title: AI URL Scanner
aiUrl.description: Discover and integrate tools, skills, and MCP servers from any URL

weixin.warningDesc: The WeChat channel is still experimental and may carry a risk of account suspension. Use it only if you understand and accept the risk.
weixin.bindDesc: Scan the QR code with WeChat to bind your personal account.
weixin.scanHint: Open WeChat and scan the QR code
weixin.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.

wecom.bindDesc: Scan the QR code with WeCom to bind your AI Bot.
wecom.enableDesc: Once bound, you can enable or disable the channel here.
wecom.enableBindFirst: Bind the bot first, then enable the channel.
wecom.notBound: WeCom AI Bot not bound yet.
wecom.scanHint: Open WeCom and scan the QR code
wecom.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.

field.secretHintSet: A value is already set. Leave blank to keep it unchanged.

page.restartRequiredDesc: The latest {{name}} configuration has been saved. Restart the gateway for it to take effect.

desc.token: Bot access token used to connect to the platform API.
desc.botToken: Bot token used to send and receive messages.
desc.appToken: App token used for Socket Mode connections.
desc.appId: Unique application ID used for authentication.
desc.appSecret: Application secret used for signing and authentication.
desc.encryptKey: Encryption key used to decrypt callback payloads.
desc.baseUrl: Platform API base URL. Official endpoint is used by default.
desc.proxy: HTTP proxy address for outbound network access.
desc.mentionOnly: Only respond when the bot is explicitly mentioned in group chats.
desc.typingEnabled: Display typing status while the assistant is generating a response.
desc.placeholderEnabled: Enable temporary placeholder messages before the final reply is sent.
desc.groupTriggerMentionOnly: In group chats, respond only when the bot is mentioned.
desc.groupTriggerPrefixes: Custom group-chat trigger prefixes, separated by commas.
desc.isLark: Use Lark international domain (open.larksuite.com) instead of Feishu domain (open.feishu.cn).
desc.allowFrom: Allowed user or group IDs, separated by commas.
desc.allowOrigins: Allowed origin domains, separated by commas.
desc.useNative: Whether to use native client mode.
desc.clientId: Client ID used for platform authentication.
desc.welcomeMessage: Welcome message content for new sessions.
desc.allowTokenQuery: Allow token in URL query parameters.
desc.requestCaps: IRC capability list requested on connect.
desc.maxBase64FileSizeMiB: Maximum size in MiB for converting local files to base64 before upload. 0 means unlimited. Applies only to local files, not URL uploads.

aiUrl.conflict_description: Some items already exist. Choose how to handle each one.
aiUrl.manual_config_description: needs connection details to be integrated.

agent.load_error: Failed to load agent support information.

plugins.empty_no_installed: No plugins installed yet. Use the AI URL Scanner to discover and install plugins.
plugins.title: Plugins

skills.description: Skills are loaded from the workspace, global Heron home, and builtin directories.
skills.delete_description: "{{name}}" will be removed from workspace skills.
skills.viewer_description: Read the current effective SKILL.md content here.

tools.description: This view reflects whether each agent tool is enabled, disabled, or blocked by a missing prerequisite.

reasons.requires_linux: This tool only works on Linux hosts with the required device files exposed.
reasons.requires_skills: Enable `tools.skills` before this skill-registry tool can be used.
reasons.requires_subagent: Enable `tools.subagent` before the spawn tool can delegate work.
reasons.requires_mcp_discovery: Enable `tools.mcp.discovery` before MCP discovery tools become available.

autoAssist.description: Automatically activate skills and tools based on context.
autoAssist.title: Auto-Assist

config.load_error: Failed to load configuration. Please refresh and try again.
config.workspace_hint: Base directory for agent file operations.
config.restrict_workspace_hint: Only allow file operations inside workspace.
config.tool_feedback_enabled_hint: Send a short tool-call preview into the current chat before each tool execution.
config.tool_feedback_max_args_length_hint: Maximum number of argument characters shown in each tool feedback message. Set to 0 to use the default.
config.exec_enabled_hint: Enable or disable command execution for the app. When disabled, no command requests will run.
config.allow_remote_hint: When enabled, remote sessions or non-local contexts can also run commands. When disabled, command execution stays limited to local safe contexts.
config.enable_deny_patterns_hint: When enabled, the app blocks commands that match its built-in dangerous patterns and the custom command blacklist below.
config.exec_timeout_seconds_hint: Maximum runtime for command requests. Set to 0 to use the default timeout.
config.custom_deny_patterns_hint: Add extra command-blocking rules, one regular expression per line. A command matching any rule here will be blocked.
config.custom_allow_patterns_hint: Add extra command-allow rules, one regular expression per line. A command matching any rule here skips blacklist matching, but other safety limits still apply.
config.pattern_detector_hint: Enter a command to test if it matches any blacklist or whitelist patterns.
config.pattern_detector_input_placeholder: Enter a command to test, e.g., rm -rf /tmp
config.allow_shell_execution_hint: Allow scheduled tasks to run commands by default. When disabled, users must pass command_confirm=true to schedule a command task.
config.cron_exec_timeout_hint: Maximum runtime for scheduled commands. Set to 0 to disable the timeout.
config.max_tokens_hint: Upper token limit per model response.
config.context_window_hint: Model input context capacity in tokens. Leave empty to use the default (4x max tokens).
config.max_tool_iterations_hint: Maximum tool-call loops in a single task.
config.summarize_threshold_hint: Start summarization after this many messages.
config.summarize_token_percent_hint: Used when conversation summary is triggered.
config.session_scope_hint: How chat context is isolated across peers/channels.
config.session_scope_per_channel_peer_desc: Separate context for each user in each channel.
config.session_scope_per_peer_desc: One context per user across channels.
config.session_scope_global_desc: All messages share one global context.
config.heartbeat_interval_hint: Interval in minutes between heartbeat signals.
config.monitor_usb_hint: Watch USB plug/unplug events when devices are enabled.
config.autostart_hint: Start Heron Web automatically when you log in.
config.autostart_unsupported: Launch at login is not supported on this platform.
config.server_port_hint: HTTP port used by Heron Web.
config.lan_access_hint: Allow access from other devices on your local network.
config.allowed_cidrs_hint: Only clients from these CIDR ranges can access the service. One per line or comma-separated. Leave empty to allow all.
config.reset_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to reset your unsaved changes back to the last saved state?
config.reset_success: Changes have been reset to the last saved state.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Graph
knowledge.description: Manage entities, relationships, and structured knowledge for your agent.

empty.title: No knowledge yet
empty.description: Start building your knowledge graph by adding entities and relations.

plugins.title: Plugin Marketplace
plugins.description: Browse and install plugins to extend your agent's capabilities.

setup.title: Permission Setup
setup.description: Configure the permissions and access levels for your agent.
setup.welcome_description: Let's set up the permissions your agent needs to operate effectively.
setup.permissions_description: Choose which capabilities the agent is allowed to use.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.description: Manage Model Context Protocol servers to extend your agent with additional tools and capabilities.
mcp.noServers: No MCP servers configured yet. Add one to extend your agent's capabilities.

discovery.title: Tool Discovery
discovery.description: Automatically discover and index tools from connected MCP servers.
